summary: Feedback/Suggestion feature testing completed. All features working correctly - Pro plan UI removed, Free pricing displayed, 'Help Us Improve' feedback card on dashboard with inline suggestion form, POST /api/suggestions API with rate limiting, admin-only GET /api/admin/feedback endpoint, admin feedback page at /admin/feedback protected by role check.
passed_tests: POST /api/suggestions - requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
POST /api/suggestions - successful submission saves to MongoDB
POST /api/suggestions - validation: rejects suggestions under 10 chars
POST /api/suggestions - validation: rejects suggestions over 500 chars
POST /api/suggestions - validation: rejects empty/missing suggestion field
POST /api/suggestions - rate limiting (429 after multiple requests within 1 minute)
GET /api/admin/feedback - requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
GET /api/admin/feedback - returns 403 for non-admin users
GET /api/admin/feedback - admin can access and view all suggestions
GET /api/admin/feedback - response excludes MongoDB _id field
Landing page - No $19 Pro pricing displayed
Landing page - No 'Upgrade to Pro' text
Landing page - No 'Most Popular' Pro badge
Landing page - Shows 'World's FIRST Wellness-Branded Link in Bio' headline
Landing page - Shows 'Completely FREE' and '$0/forever' pricing
Landing page - Single pricing card with all features included
Navbar - No 'Pricing' link present
Dashboard - No 'Upgrade to Pro' card
Dashboard - 'Help Us Improve' card present with feedback icon
Dashboard - 'Suggest Features' button expands inline form
Dashboard - Suggestion textarea with placeholder text
Dashboard - Character counter (0/500) visible
Dashboard - Cancel and Send buttons in form
Dashboard - data-testid attributes present on interactive elements
Admin /admin/feedback - Admin user can access page
Admin /admin/feedback - Shows 'Feature Suggestions' heading
Admin /admin/feedback - Table with User Email, Suggestion, Date columns
Admin /admin/feedback - 'Back to Dashboard' link present
Admin /admin/feedback - 'Refresh' button present
Admin /admin/feedback - Non-admin user redirected to dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting is in-memory (Map<string, number>) - will reset on server restart. Consider Redis/MongoDB for production persistence.
XSS sanitization in suggestions is basic HTML entity encoding - acceptable for MVP.
Admin email list is hardcoded in route.ts - consider moving to environment variable or database.
seed_data_creation: 6 feature suggestions created in featureSuggestions collection during testing. Users: normaluser@test.com, analyticstest@test.com, newuser@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feedback/suggestion system fully tested. APIs: POST /api/suggestions (logged-in users), GET /api/admin/feedback (admin-only). Dashboard has 'Help Us Improve' card with inline suggestion form. Admin page at /admin/feedback shows all suggestions in a table. Admin emails whitelist: admin@gotolinks.com, localtest@test.com, analyticstest@test.com. Landing page has single free pricing card with no Pro plan elements.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. All features implemented correctly.
